k_file.description: Absolute path to LS-DYNA .k input file on the SHARED filesystem (must be readable from the remote head at the same path). Output (d3plot) lands in its parent directory.

lstc_license_ip.description: IPv4 of the LSTC license server reachable from compute nodes.

dry_run.description: If true (default), only writes the sbatch script and records a 'dry_run' registry row. No sbatch submission. Set false to actually submit.
